Amended Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Document Requests
Off Calendar Aug-29-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Casey Nokes for plaintiff and moving party: Kirkland & Ellis LLP.
Jessica K. Nall and Anthony P. Schoenberg for defendant and opposing party: 555 California Owner LP, 555 California Owner, LLC., Shorenstein Realty Services, LP. and Mark Karesick

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modification: Plaintiff Kirkland & Ellis' motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. As to interrogatories #14 - 17 (set #3), the scope of any responses are limited to the following tenants: Citigroup, Sidley / Austin, and Orchid Asia. Further responses are to be provided on or before September 22, 2006. The parties shall enter into a stipulated protective order to ensure that any information disclosed is only used for purposes of the present litigation.
MODIFICATION: That interrogatory #4 and request for production #7 limited to exclude tax returns 3rd party information, and information unrelated to defendant. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
